notes: Address (2803 West 95th Street, Evergreen Park, IL 60805) and phone (708) 425-1134 both confirmed exactly on the location page. Site is Family Dental Care, PC, a multi-location group with ~8 offices across Chicago-area IL/IN (South Chicago, East Side, Calumet City, Munster, two Evergreen Park locations, Oak Lawn, Crestwood) and 125+ staff. Careers page lists general hiring categories (general dentists, hygienists, specialists, residents, clinical assistants, front desk, insurance/AR, HR, marketing, executive) via a general employment-application form rather than dated individual job postings; no single owner-dentist statement found for this location beyond the footer name.

owner_operator_stated: Described on the homepage as a family-operated firm serving the community since it opened in 1958 (no individual owner name given).
